title: Workflow - Ability to move an item to another board

posts.author: MomoWatanabe (Momo)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday Workflow - I would like to be able to “move an item to another board” within the Monday workflow product (not the regular automation). Automation does not have the capacity to get item data, therefore any column information that is not designated to the new location will be lost. Workflow would allow this to work in a seamless manner.
